ocr.text: In the Fleet Utilization Report for Fiscal Year 2024, ONE Ocean Network Express presents a detailed overview of its fleet
VesselName  DaysOperated  UtilizationRate(%)  Revenue(USD)  OperatingCosts(USD)  NetIncome(USD)  CAPEX(USD)  OPEX(USD)  Avg.Age(Years)  FuelConsumed(MT)
Vessel A operated for 320 days with a utilization rate of 85%, generating total revenue of $15M, incurring operating costs of
$5M, and achieving a net income of $10M, alongside CAPEX of $2M, OPEX of $3M, an average age of 5 years, and fuel
Vessel B, with 310 days operated and an 80% utilization rate, accrued $14M in revenue, $4.5M in operating costs, $9.5M net
income, $2.5M CAPEX, $3M OPEX, 6 years average age, and 1,150 MT fuel consumed. Vessel C operated for 305 days at a
90% utilization rate, generating $16M in revenue, $6M in operating costs, $10M net income, $2.2M CAPEX, $3.5M OPEX,
with an average age of 4 years and 1,100 MT fuel. Vessel D had 325 days of operation, 75% utilization, with $13M revenue,
$5.5M operating costs, $7.5M net income, $2M CAPEX, $2.8M OPEX, an average of 8 years, and 1,300 MT fuel. Vessel E
operated for 300 days at 88% utilization, yielding $15.5M revenue, $5.2M operating costs, $10.3M net income, $2.3M CAPEX,
$3.2M OPEX, average age of 3 years, and 1,250 MT fuel. Additionally, the Drydocking and Maintenance Schedule highlights
Vessel 1 with drydock costs of $500K scheduled for Q1 2024, routine maintenance for 30 days, expected revenue of $1M;
Vessel 2 with $750K drydock costs in Q2 2024 for emergency maintenance for 45 days, yielding $800K; Vessel 3 with $600K
in drydock costs for routine maintenance in Q3 2024 over 25 days, expecting $900K; and Vessel 4, with $450K drydock costs
in Q4 2024 for routine maintenance over 20 days, anticipated at $1.2M. The total drydock costs sum to $2.35M, with an
average duration of 30 days and total revenue estimated at $3.9M.
